recommendations.title: The Road Within
recommendations.overview: A young man with Tourette's Syndrome embarks on a road trip with his recently-deceased mother's ashes.

recommendations.title: The Old Man and the Sea
recommendations.overview: An old fisherman makes the biggest catch of his life.

recommendations.title: Harvie Krumpet
recommendations.overview: The odd biography of Harvie Krumpet, a man who has Tourette's Syndrome, chronic bad luck, menial jobs, nudist tendencies, and a book of "fakts" hung around his neck - but still optimistically lives own way and enjoys the small things life has to offe

recommendations.title: Safe Haven
recommendations.overview: A young woman with a mysterious past lands in Southport, North Carolina where her bond with a widower forces her to confront the dark secret that haunts her.

recommendations.title: Suzume
recommendations.overview: Suzume, 17, lost her mother as a little girl. On her way to school, she meets a mysterious young man. But her curiosity unleashes a calamity that endangers the entire population of Japan, and so Suzume embarks on a journey to set things right.

recommendations.title: Hercules in New York
recommendations.overview: Hercules is sent from Mount Olympus to modern-day Manhattan, where he takes up professional wrestling before getting mixed up with a gang of mobsters.

recommendations.title: The Book of Life
recommendations.overview: The journey of Manolo, a young man who is torn between fulfilling the expectations of his family and following his heart. Before choosing which path to follow, he embarks on an incredible adventure that spans fantastical worlds where he must face his

recommendations.title: Where Hope Grows
recommendations.overview: Calvin Campbell is a former professional baseball player sent to an early retirement due to his panic attacks at the plate. Even though he had all the talent for the big leagues, he struggles with the curveballs life has thrown him. Today, he mindles

recommendations.title: Jesus
recommendations.overview: Three and a half years of Jesus' ministry, as told in the Gospel of Luke.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Way Home
recommendations.overview: The adventure of Bella, a dog who embarks on an epic 400-mile journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.
